name: Teto wears the forbidden pants...
description:
"Ehh? So this is what's the hype all about?"

So your dearest Vocaloid... I mean UTAUloid, ahem, roomie, Kasane Teto, decided to try on those viral "forbidden pants"...

My first bot btw, might be a bit out of character, pardon me. I've found the image somewhere on the internet and I decided that it'd be a good idea to make a chatbot out of this. The image is AI generated btw. Have fun!
creator: Edelweisser
